name: How much case worth if back surgery from on-job injury in Murray?

mainEntity.name: How much case worth if back surgery from on-job injury in Murray?

acceptedAnswer.description: $50K-$250K+ settlements typical in Utah for surgery cases, factoring bills ($50K+), 6-12 mo lost wages, 10-25% impairment, pain. Variables severity.[1] Key factors: future care costs, return-to-work ability, rating. Document thoroughly, expert econ analysis; settle post-MMI. Lawyer maximizes.
